given: commands/dev.md after V1 prose fix applied
when: reading the graphify enrichment section (between the 'Graphify enrichment' anchor and '### Step 8' heading)
then: no fenced bash block (```bash opening) appears in the section; the words 'graphify.json' and 'sentinel' both appear; the phrase 'skipped/sentinel_absent' or equivalent skip instruction appears for the absent-sentinel case

patterns.rationale: no fenced bash block may appear in the graphify enrichment prose section — style-inspector Standard 1 (no-inline-code)
sentinel file path containing graphify.json must be named in prose
prose must describe what to do when sentinel is absent: skip dispatch and record graphify_status=skipped/sentinel_absent

when: reading the AC-F5 check patterns in the JSON and the assertion patterns in the test file
then: no pattern references GRAPHIFY_SENTINEL= (bash variable assignment) and no pattern references if.*-f.*GRAPHIFY_SENTINEL (bash if test); patterns reference prose-extractable content (graphify.json literal and sentinel/absent wording)

patterns.rationale: acceptance-criteria JSON must not require bash assignment syntax after prose conversion
acceptance-criteria JSON must not require bash if-test syntax after prose conversion
test assertions must not match bash variable assignment syntax after prose conversion
test assertions must not match bash if-test syntax after prose conversion
test must still verify sentinel path reference (graphify.json) appears in the prose section
